message:
docs: mark 2026-03-12 feature parity verification as historical snapshot

The FEATURE_PARITY_VERIFICATION_20260312.md report previously declared
"FULL FEATURE PARITY CONFIRMED" without qualifying that the conclusion
applied only to the 33-header / 256-function surface audited on that
date. The repository surface has grown beyond that scope since March 12.

Changes:
- Add historical-note banner directing readers to current source-backed
  inventory documents (RUST_EXPORTED_SURFACE_INVENTORY.md,
  DEFERRED_SURFACE_REGISTER.md, SUBSYSTEM_EVIDENCE_MATRIX.md).
- Reword executive-summary verdict to clarify it covers the audited
  March 12 surface, not the full current repository surface.
- Add scoping caveat to the conclusion section.
- Record corresponding closed docs issue (bd-7ddm) in .beads/issues.jsonl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-66l.8","title":"Implement per-target binary-size and cold-start SLO gates","description":"Background:
Idea round 2 includes per-target binary size and cold-start gates as embedded adoption multipliers.

Subtasks:
- Capture size and cold-start baselines for key target profiles and triplets.
- Define budget policy and tolerance windows per profile/resource class.
- Integrate checks into CI with clear delta reporting and reproducible rerun commands.
- Emit structured gate artifacts (target, baseline, delta, suspect modules, run metadata) for trend analysis and release review.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Regressions in size/start metrics fail gate when outside approved budgets.
- Reports identify changed targets and likely contributing modules.
- Baseline updates require explicit rationale and audit trail.
- Gate artifacts are machine-readable and linkable from release evidence bundles.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:57:19.423164995Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-01T05:29:18.543969085Z","closed_at":"2026-03-01T05:29:18.543951361Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","embedded","performance"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.8","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.8","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.8","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.8","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.9","title":"Enforce per-bead evidence linkage contract for unit/e2e/logging completeness","description":"Background:
The hard-part verification rules require every semantic-sensitive implementation bead to carry explicit proof linkage, not only CI-level gating.

Subtasks:
- Define required evidence fields per implementation bead: linked unit tests, linked e2e scripts, expected artifact manifests, and replay/parity references.
- Require linkage against the unit/invariant completeness matrix (bd-1md.12) and canonical e2e suite contract (bd-1md.10) so evidence remains coverage-complete, not ad hoc.
- Add validation tooling that checks bead metadata and notes for required evidence references before status transitions to done.
- Integrate checks with anti-butchering proof-block gate and traceability index updates.
- Provide reviewer/operator guidance for interpreting evidence packs quickly.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Semantic-sensitive beads cannot be marked complete without linked unit/e2e/logging evidence.
- Evidence packs reference explicit unit/invariant obligations and at least one canonical e2e lane per covered semantic surface.
- Validation failures are explicit and actionable.
- Evidence links remain machine-checkable for audit and release @@ -1,18 +1,30 @@
 # Feature Parity Verification Report
 
+> **Historical Note (2026-03-27):** This report is a March 12 verification snapshot for a narrower surface audit. It should not be read as the current project-wide parity verdict for the full repo as it exists now.
+>
+> For current source-backed surface status, use:
+> - `docs/RUST_EXPORTED_SURFACE_INVENTORY.md`
+> - `docs/DEFERRED_SURFACE_REGISTER.md`
+> - `docs/SUBSYSTEM_EVIDENCE_MATRIX.md`
+
 > **Date:** 2026-03-12
 > **Auditor:** AmberCrane (claude-code/opus-4.6)
 > **Methodology:** /porting-to-rust Phase 5 — Conformance Testing & QA
 > **Rust baseline:** `38c152405bd03e2bd9eecf178bfbbe9472fed861` (2026-02-26)
 
 ## 1. Executive Summary
 
-**Verdict: FULL FEATURE PARITY CONFIRMED**
+**Verdict (Historical Snapshot): parity confirmed for the audited March 12 surface, not for the full current repository surface**
 
 All 256 declared public API functions are implemented. All 22 semantic units
 pass conformance gates. Zero semantic delta. Profile parity verified across
 CORE, FREESTANDING, and EMBEDDED_ROUTER profiles.
 
+That conclusion applies to the audited surface described in this document. The
+current repository surface is broader than this report's 33-header / 256-function
+audit scope, so newer source-backed inventory/register documents should be
+treated as the current authority for shipped-surface status.
+
 ## 2. Quality Gate Results
 
 | Gate | Result | Detail |
@@ -147,6 +159,10 @@ reference implementation. All 256 public functions are implemented, all 22
 semantic units pass their acceptance obligations, and all exercisable quality
 gates produce zero failures with zero semantic delta.
 
+This conclusion is preserved here as a historical record of the March 12 audit
+scope. It should not be interpreted as a blanket statement about the broader
+surface now present in the repository.
+
 The remaining gaps (Rust fixture capture, fuzz-parity, embedded-matrix) are
 infrastructure/environment constraints, not implementation gaps. No code
 changes are required for feature parity — only CI environment setup.
